title: A Strange Kingdom in Elbaf
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Saul, Unknown person #3, Nami, Usopp as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: too many dudes around for this to be a dream...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A new look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What kind of dreams are you having?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In that case, Nami- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's Flyy!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Careful, this place is falling apart!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I woke up on the other end of town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard a noise and followed it till I found this Goof beating up a big rabbit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could've taken that cat-lion thing, right, usopp?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IT ALREADY HAD ME IN ITS MOUTH WHEN I CAME TO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I totally lost my cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Here's where I'm at!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our threads resemble what the warriors of Elbaf are always wearing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there's no way they'd have clothes that'd fit us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I think there's people in town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're talking about an island of giants, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't clear this up without chatting to them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's just ask about them in town!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: besides, this area's too vast, and we have no idea which way the sea is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're right. Let's head to town!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: the others don't seem to be here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How do you know?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's time for adventure!!

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: My radar isn't picking up Robin-chan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wooooo 4 Hoooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Sniff sniff-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ARE YOU A HOUND?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why are you so amped up?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's say this is Elbaf... could we have been gigantified?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Then again, this tree is definitely fake...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You realize we know literally nothing about this place, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't fear, Nami-San! I'm here for 'You!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: something's coming.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait a minute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's gross!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Woah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hello there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh man! A grass- Hopper?! That's so cool!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You must be newcomers.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No way! Nuh-Uh! Keep that bug away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who are you, old-timer?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where is this place?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do you know where our crewmates are?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THAT'S A LOT OF QUESTIONS...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: my apologies. I'm in too much of a rush to stay and chat...

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
